nmeawc_historySeconds_help: Seconds of AWA/TWA history used for the min/max shift sectors. 0 disables.
nmeawc_closeHauledAngle_help: Half-angle of the port/starboard color bands at the bow.
nmeahc_stateId_help: Path under the instance, e.g. windData.windSpeedApparent
nmeahc_historySeconds_help: How many seconds of samples to keep and display
nmeahc_yMin_help: Lower bound (exact when autoScale is off, otherwise a suggestion)
nmeahc_yMax_help: Upper bound (exact when autoScale is off, otherwise a suggestion)
nmeahc_autoScale_help: Treat yMin/yMax only as suggestions and let the axis expand to fit the data
nmeaair_ownMmsi_help: Hide the own AIS transponder from the radar (the boat is already shown at the centre). Leave empty to show all AIS targets.
